challenges.title: HTML5 Document
challenges.description: Create a proper HTML5 document with the correct <!DOCTYPE html> declaration, an <html> element with a lang attribute, <head> with a <title>, and a <body> with some content. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '<!doctype html>' in html.lower(), 'Should have the HTML5 doctype declaration'
assert '<html' in html.lower(), 'Should contain an <html> element'
assert 'lang=' in html.lower(), 'The <html> element should have a lang attribute'
assert '</html>' in html.lower(), 'Should close the <html> element'
assert '<head>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <head> element'
assert '<title>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <title> element'
assert '<body>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <body> element'
assert '</body>' in html.lower(), 'Should close the <body> element'
hints: The HTML5 doctype is simply <!DOCTYPE html> — much simpler than older versions
Add lang="en" to the <html> tag to specify the document language

challenges.title: Page Metadata
challenges.description: Create a page with the HTML5 doctype, a <head> containing a charset meta tag (UTF-8) and a <title>, and a <body> with a paragraph. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code: assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should have the HTML5 doctype declaration' assert ' tag' assert 'charset' in html.lower(), 'Should have a charset attribute in the meta tag' assert 'utf-8' in html.lower(), 'Should specify UTF-8 as the character encoding' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <title> element' assert '' in html.lower(), 'Should close the element' assert '<body>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <body> element' assert '<p>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <p> paragraph in the body'
hints: Use <meta charset="UTF-8"> inside the <head> to declare character encoding
The meta charset tag is a self-closing tag — it does not need a closing tag
